title.en: The hope of escape is completely annihilated!

content.en:
Now, Ye Tian's God Destroyer is no longer the original God Destroyer, after all, Ye Tian's God Soul is much stronger than before, and the God Destroying Origin Divine Power has also been raised to the perfection realm, and the grade has also reached the level of the top low-grade Origin Divine Power.

Therefore, the power of God Destroying was far greater than that of the day when he fought against the Ten True Monarchs.

The Eyeless True Monarch is indeed very powerful, but there is no strange thing that can protect the divine soul, only a half-way weapon, which cannot completely stop Ye Tian's God Extermination.

Burst!

The Divine Exterminator's Divine Soul was severely damaged with a single blow, almost tearing his Divine Soul in half.

The Eyeless True Monarch was terrified and wanted to escape, but Ye Tian's Golden Eye Realm descended and blocked this area.

At the same time, Shenwei activated, and a terrifying suction force directly sucked the Eyeless True Monarch towards Ye Tian.

The hope of escape is completely annihilated!

Under one attack after another, even if the Eyeless True Monarch had the Blood River Immortal Technique, it was still difficult to resist the attacks again and again, his body was annihilated little by little, and his divine soul was also severely damaged by the God of Extermination again and again.

A few minutes later!

The Eyeless True Monarch's divine soul was completely annihilated, and his physical body was also worn out by nearly sixty percent.

"Finally killed it!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

His strength was indeed much stronger than that of the Eyeless True Monarch, but a powerhouse at the level of a half-step True Ancestor was too difficult to kill, and he was able to kill a half-step True Ancestor in a few minutes, which was already terrifying.

And among the other half-step True Ancestors, if there is a fight, it will take a long time.

Some of the true monarchs on the list of true monarchs have killed true monarchs, but they are not simply killed, but rely on a lot of time, and some even chase and kill for decades, or trap a true monarch for tens of thousands of years, and slowly grind each other to death.

Like Ye Tian, it was definitely an exaggeration to kill a powerful half-step True Ancestor in just a few minutes.

Of course!

This protagonist relied on Ye Tian's God Destruction to severely damage the Eyeless True Monarch's divine soul again and again, and the Golden Eye Realm restrained the Eyeless True Monarch, making him hopeless to escape.

Otherwise, it would be more difficult for Ye Tian to kill the Eyeless True Monarch.

......

The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden didn't go too far, and after only flying for a minute, she landed on the ruins of a mountain range, silently waiting for Ye Tian.

She didn't think that Ye Tian would have anything, and she knew very well how rebellious Ye Tian's life-saving methods were, and she also mastered an upgraded version of the Source Divine Power similar to the Blood River Immortal Technique-the Blood River True Body.

Coupled with Ye Tian's anti-heaven strength, maybe he is expected to kill a half-step true ancestor.

Using some common sense in the chaos to measure Ye Tian, it is estimated that he will be unlucky.

In her cognition, Ye Tian has completely broken the chaotic cognition, and the cognition of genius, Ye Tian seems to be able to be divided into another level of genius, far surpassing the genius of this grade passed down by Dao Ancestor.

This is her perception of Ye Tian!

A long time ago, she completely gave up the goal of chasing Ye Tian, because this goal could not be achieved at all, unless one day, she could obtain an incomparable inheritance against the sky, then there was still a glimmer of hope to surpass Ye Tian.

It's a pity that many True Monarchs underestimated Ye Tian, and even the half-step True Ancestor of the God of War Tower seriously underestimated Ye Tian.

And the reason why she thinks so highly of Ye Tian is not because of how amazing Ye Tian's performance is, but because of some kind of induction of herself.

It's one of her secrets!

She can initially sense the good and evil as well as the strength and weakness of others, and after her strength is improved to the true monarch, this sensing ability will become more obvious.

This ability is not a talent, nor is it some kind of secret art, and she can't say what the specific situation is.

But in her induction, Ye Tian had no ill will towards her, and there was not much kindness, but that was enough, otherwise she would not have cooperated with Ye Tian.

In addition, Ye Tian even surpassed the half-step True Ancestor of the God of War Tower, which was also the reason why she was extremely confident in Ye Tian, but she didn't tell anyone, not even Ye Tian.

Not long after, Ye Tian came back.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, have you gotten rid of that half-step True Ancestor?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden asked.

"He's dead!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden's eyes widened, and her heart was extremely shocked.

That is a half-step true ancestor, and it is not a weak half-step true god, it is the most top-notch and powerful half-step true ancestor, this half-step true ancestor is stronger than many true ancestor powerhouses in the early stage realm of the Great Dao!

And Ye Tian killed a half-step True Ancestor in such a short period of time, this speed is terrifying!

She didn't doubt Ye Tian's words, because Ye Tian didn't need to tell lies.

At this time, Ye Tian's evaluation in her heart rose a small notch.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Good!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded.

Immediately, the two hurried away.

The ruins of the battlefield are very large, but most of the area is very dilapidated, the earth is shattered, and there are countless void cracks in the void, these void cracks contain terrifying power and laws, if some true monarchs don't pay attention, they will even be cut in half by the void cracks.

Moreover, the space here is very stable, even more stable than the space of the quasi-Dao realm, and it is a little difficult for Zhenjun to shuttle through the space, and he can't travel too far away.

Therefore, the speed at which the True Monarchs are on the road in the battlefield ruins will not be very fast.

Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden also saw many ruins and ruins during their journey, but they didn't stop long, and even saw some treasures, they didn't stop, they just made marks.

For them, that place of heritage is the real treasure.

Half an hour later, the two arrived at their destination.

"Wanfa Daozi, this is it!"

The Yunzi Priestess pointed to a piece of broken earth in front of her and said.

Ye Tian's divine sense swept through the earth and void in this area.

"Underground, there is a palace, and the inheritance should be inside!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, the two tore the earth apart, and a corner of the palace was exposed.

Soon, the two found the entrance to the palace.

This palace is very intact, and the formation is relatively intact, but the original battle allowed the earth to cover this palace, leaving it buried under the earth for countless years.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian tried to attack, but found that he couldn't shake the formation at all.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the formation of this palace is very intact, I'm afraid that even the top true ancestor can't break the formation in a short time, so let's use the inheritance key in my hand!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden took out the inheritance key, and immediately attracted each other to the formation of this palace.

Rumble!!!!

The entrance to the main hall gradually opened under the influence of the inheritance key, revealing a portal.

"Let's go inside, but be careful, as I know, there are probably some puppets inside this hall that are used for daily life. I'm afraid that the puppets used by such strong people are not simple, and there may even be true ancestor puppets!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said cautiously.

Ye Tian didn't dare to be careless, and all kinds of defensive magic powers were used one by one, and he protected the Yunzi Divine Maiden, lest the Yunzi Divine Maiden be killed in an instant after entering the palace.

Rumble!!!

The two walked through the portal and into the interior of the palace.
